category_sources: Official ROS docs describe urdfdom as a library to access URDFs using the DOM model.
source_facts.description says this is a Unified Robot Description Format parser.
display_name_sources: Official ROS docs and repository identify the project as urdfdom.
docs_sources: Official ROS generated documentation is a dedicated documentation surface for urdfdom.
Official repository README points to the ROS URDF wiki for format details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/ros/urdfdom, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official ROS docs describe core data structures and XML parsing for URDF files.
